message:
perf: eliminate unused CSS and lazy-load KaTeX styles

BREAKING OPTIMIZATION:
- Remove highlight.js/styles/github-dark.css from globals.css
  This was NEVER USED - MarkdownRenderer uses react-syntax-highlighter
  with one-dark theme, not highlight.js. Dead CSS on every page.

- Move katex/dist/katex.min.css to MarkdownRenderer component
  KaTeX is only used for math rendering in blog posts, not on
  homepage/projects/tldr. Now only loads when viewing a blog post.

Before: Both CSS files loaded on ALL pages (~80KB+ unnecessary)
After: KaTeX CSS loads ONLY on /writing/[slug] pages

This eliminates the CSS preload warnings the user was seeing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
